scenes.title: The Bribe
scenes.description: A failing student discreetly offers money to bump their grade.

dialogue.studentOffer: {studentName}{majorSuffix}: "Professor... I can't fail. Maybe we can... work something out?"
dialogue.professorPrompt: Professor: "A discreet envelope, left on the desk. What do you do?"

choices.label: ACCEPT
choices.studentReply: {studentName}: "Thank you, Professor. You won't regret this."
choices.professorReply: Professor: "...Fine. Your grade is now a C. Not a word to anyone."
choices.outcome: You accepted the bribe. Academic integrity has left the chat.

choices.label: KICK OUT
choices.professorReply: Professor: "Absolutely not. Get out of my office."
choices.outcome: You kicked the student out. The grade stays on the record.

scenes.title: Scholarship on the Line
scenes.description: A C-grade student begs for help before losing their scholarship.
scenes.banner: Grade: {grade} — A student wants to talk

dialogue.studentOffer: {studentName}{majorSuffix}: "Professor, my scholarship depends on a B. Can we talk?"
dialogue.professorPrompt: Professor: "They look genuinely stressed. How do you respond?"

choices.label: EXTRA CREDIT
choices.studentReply: {studentName}: "Thank you! I won't let you down!"
choices.professorReply: Professor: "One bonus question next week. Don't waste it."
choices.outcome: You offered extra credit. Hope they earn it.

choices.label: STAND FIRM
choices.professorReply: Professor: "The grade stands. Work harder next term."
choices.outcome: You stood firm. The grade stays a C.

scenes.title: Thank-You Gift
scenes.description: An A student brings a small gift after an excellent exam.

dialogue.studentOffer: {studentName}{majorSuffix}: "Professor, thank you! I brought you something small."
dialogue.professorPrompt: Professor: "A wrapped gift on the desk. Accept it?"

choices.label: ACCEPT GIFT
choices.professorReply: Professor: "That's very kind. You made my day."
choices.outcome: You accepted the gift graciously. Teaching feels worth it.

choices.label: POLITELY DECLINE
choices.professorReply: Professor: "Thank you, but I can't accept gifts from students."
